exceptions.rationale: The application adapter layer still invokes export services directly from architecture orchestration.
exceptions.removalCondition: Introduce an export port in taxonomy-extension-api and inject the adapter from taxonomy-app.

exceptions.rationale: Diagram generation currently consumes application architecture view models.
exceptions.removalCondition: Move canonical export input contracts into taxonomy-export or taxonomy-extension-api.

exceptions.rationale: Catalog facades expose relation-enriched node representations.
exceptions.removalCondition: Replace direct relation package dependencies with a read port owned by the catalog boundary.

exceptions.rationale: Relation persistence references canonical taxonomy nodes and catalog-owned relation entities.
exceptions.removalCondition: Move shared node/relation identities to a framework-free domain contract module.

exceptions.rationale: Version operations require explicit workspace context and repository routing.
exceptions.removalCondition: Introduce a versioning-owned repository-context port implemented by the workspace adapter.

exceptions.rationale: Workspace synchronization currently invokes versioning and repository-state services.
exceptions.removalCondition: Move synchronization orchestration to an application service above both bounded contexts.

exceptions.rationale: Spring/JGit persistence and export adapters still reside below the com.taxonomy.dsl package root in taxonomy-app.
exceptions.removalCondition: Move these adapters to a dedicated taxonomy-adapters module and leave taxonomy-dsl framework-free.

exceptions.rationale: Application services still address DSL persistence/export adapters through their historical package names.
exceptions.removalCondition: Move these adapters to a dedicated taxonomy-adapters module and expose narrow ports.
